name: Catherine Cohen
bio: Catherine Cohen is an American comedian, singer, and poet whose cabaret-style act mixes stand-up with original songs accompanied on piano. She won Best Newcomer at the 2019 Edinburgh Fringe and released her debut special, The Twist...? Shes Gorgeous, on Netflix in 2022.

timeline.ev: Develops her cabaret act with pianist Henry Koperski
Wins Best Newcomer at the Edinburgh Fringe Festival
Publishes poetry collection God I Feel Modern Tonight
Releases Netflix special The Twist...? Shes Gorgeous

accolades: Netflix stand-up special, The Twist...? Shes Gorgeous (2022)
Co-host of the podcast Seek Treatment

specials.t: Catherine Cohen: The Twist...? Shes Gorgeous
